message:
refactor(db,server,tools): extract run_with_mvcc_retry, harden TUI panels, and apply clippy fixes

DB layer (queries.rs):
- Extract generic `run_with_mvcc_retry` helper that restarts entire
  transaction bodies on BusySnapshot/MVCC conflicts, replacing ~12
  inline retry loops in ensure_project, register_agent,
  create_message_with_recipients, mark_message_read, acknowledge_message,
  respond_contact, ensure_product, insert_system_agent, and others
- Add unit test for run_with_mvcc_retry restart semantics
- Fix timestamp migration detection: empty legacy schemas now correctly
  report TimestampFormat::Empty instead of triggering false incompatible
  flags (with test)
- Drop MutexGuard early in coalesce.rs to avoid holding lock during len()
- Add #[must_use] and const fn annotations to DbConnGuard
- Replace if-let chains with map_or_else, is_some_and, is_none_or
- Fix clippy: &*conn deref coercions, as-casts to i64::from/try_from,
  unnecessary .clone() on handles, redundant .into_iter().flatten()

Server/TUI:
- Dashboard: snapshot panels (agents, contacts, projects, reservations)
  now ignore quick-query filter text, keeping operational state truthful
  while query hits show in the dedicated query panel
- Projects screen: parse text-format timestamps via timestamp_sort_expr,
  include active reservation counts in recovery path, handle ISO 8601
  created_at in recovery queries
- Explorer: fix blank-recipient-name bug when to_agents CSV is empty by
  splitting on ',' and filtering blanks; add inbound ack filter test
- Cleanup: use is_some_and, enumerate() instead of manual counters,
  flatten else-after-return blocks
- lib.rs: use map_or for signal handling, struct init syntax in tests,
  const fn for config predicates, safe u16/i64 casts
- startup_checks: let-else for read_line, add .truncate(false) on
  OpenOptions, move `use fs2::FileExt` to module top

Tools/core/share:
- identity.rs: flatten match-on-normalize into if-let-else, merge nested
  if-let for resolve_pane_identity
- messaging.rs: invert if-else for alias normalization (canonical first),
  use .contains() for column checks
- products/macros/contacts: reformat normalize_agent_name calls
- llm.rs/search.rs: merge nested if-let, use range contains()
- reservations.rs: use std::mem::take instead of drain, merge if-let
- resources.rs: const fn for redacted_bcc, use Vec::is_empty as predicate
- bocpd/conformal/toon: whitespace and formatting fixes
- conformance: sort imports, fix format string

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1773,7 +1773,7 @@ fn run_share_export_once(
     let finalize_us = t3.elapsed().as_micros() as u64;
 
     let context = mcp_agent_mail_share::SnapshotContext {
-        snapshot_path: snapshot_path.clone(),
+        snapshot_path,
         scope,
         scrub_summary,
         fts_enabled: finalize.fts_enabled,
